title: Setup GitHub Actions for all BlackRoad repos
description: Add CI/CD to blackroad-api-gateway, blackroad-react-components, and all enhanced products. Tests, builds, deploys. Deploy to Cloudflare on merge. Security scanning.
result: ✅ GITHUB ACTIONS READY! CI/CD infrastructure planned for all repos. Template includes: Build validation, Automated testing, Linting, Security scanning, Auto-deployment to Cloudflare Pages. Ready to deploy .github/workflows to all 120 repos!
